overview.description: The First Trust Enhanced Stocks, Bonds & Gold ETF (ESBG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF, seeking to provide long-term total return. The fund invests in futures contracts to provide equal, leveraged exposure to the S&P 500, intermediate US Treasuries, and Gold ESBG was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
